ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the economic indicator */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, monthly, quarterly) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the indicator data */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data source (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_market_indexes" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock market index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock market index */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the stock market index */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the index data */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data source (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "granger_causality_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Granger causality test */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator used in the test */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock market index used in the test */,
  "f_statistic" REAL /* F-statistic of the test */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability value of the test */,
  "remark" TEXT /* Remark on the significance of the test result */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of Granger causality test (e.g., pair-wise, multi-variable) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used in the test */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_granger_causality_tests_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_granger_causality_tests_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES stock_market_indexes ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_granger_causality_tests_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research paper */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research paper */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the research paper */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the research paper was published */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the research paper */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the research paper */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords or tags associated with the research paper */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the paper (e.g., draft, reviewed, published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the paper */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who wrote the paper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data series */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator or stock market index */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock market index (if applicable) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data point */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data point (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_series_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES stock_market_indexes ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_series_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Granger causality test */,
  "null_hypothesis" TEXT /* Null hypothesis of the test */,
  "observation" INTEGER /* Observation of the test */,
  "f_statistic" REAL /* F-statistic of the test */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability value of the test */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the test result */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES granger_causality_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_paper_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each paper version */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research paper */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the research paper */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the paper was updated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the changes in the version */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_paper_versions_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_paper_versions_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES research_papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_series_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data series */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data value */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data value (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the paper or data */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research paper or data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the paper or data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the paper or data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES research_papers ("paper_id")
)
